SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.dashboard.metrics.source

Interface MetricsSource

All Known Implementing Classes:
LocalRegistryMetricsSource, PrometheusMetricsSource, SharedStoreMetricsSource
public interface MetricsSource
Where the dashboard's metrics come from. This seam decouples the controllers from "read the local MeterRegistry", so the same UI can be backed by a single instance (default) or, in a clustered deployment, by a cluster-wide aggregate — see the distributed-dashboard design document.

P0 ships the default LocalRegistryMetricsSource (this instance's in-process registry). The cluster-aware implementations (Prometheus query layer, shared snapshot store) plug in here later without touching the controllers or the UI.

Author:
Anand Manissery

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<ApiHealth>
    health()
    Per-API health classification.
    SourceInfo
    info()
    Provenance of the above (mode, instances reporting, freshness) so the UI can label the figures.
    default List<InstanceMetrics>
    instances()
    Per-instance metrics for the cluster's Instances view — one entry per reporting member, each with that member's own summary and last-seen time.
    List<SeriesPoint>
    series(long windowSec)
    Trend samples for the timeline chart, newest last.
    MetricsSummary
    summary()
    Global aggregate plus per-API KPIs.

  • Method Details

    • summary

      MetricsSummary summary()
      Global aggregate plus per-API KPIs.

    • health

      List<ApiHealth> health()
      Per-API health classification.

    • info

      SourceInfo info()
      Provenance of the above (mode, instances reporting, freshness) so the UI can label the figures.

    • series

      List<SeriesPoint> series(long windowSec)
      Trend samples for the timeline chart, newest last. windowSec <= 0 means "all retained". Local mode reads the optional in-memory ring (empty when history is disabled); Prometheus mode derives a cluster-wide, reload-surviving trend from query_range.

    • instances

      default List<InstanceMetrics> instances()
      Per-instance metrics for the cluster's Instances view — one entry per reporting member, each with that member's own summary and last-seen time. Defaults to empty: sources without a per-instance dimension (so the UI simply hides the Instances tab). shared-store and prometheus override it.
      Returns:
      per-instance metrics, or an empty list when the source has no per-instance breakdown
